{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260322190334626C23EC8DF017D85CB0"}"},"total":3},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7598203622955942680","common":{"comment_type":-90,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"其他不管用，体验卡退[吐]"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1769098143,"group_id":"7594295297421888537","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2NyO47o5A8nVdsnaARkvJw1EXHdWWnqVI79YvLdmohaIv","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":2,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/ade1061d87bf4604abe5ed3b069390f7~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776702305&x-signature=xakF1H0hpapIs93iyJcP9rYHSc8%3D","user_id":"4244532427234967","user_name":"情儿~阿冰"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"4244532427234967","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7594295297421888537","book_info":{"abstract":"2009年，奥兰多安利球馆，湖人4-1击败魔术夺冠。
更衣室香槟雨中，孙悦却接到了库普切克的通知：“孙，下赛季我们不需要你了。”
作为首个拿到NBA冠军的中国后卫，由于“偷笑门”和实力不济，他成了全网笑柄，CBA都未必有位置。
就在打包行李离开洛杉矶的前夜，【篮坛通神系统】觉醒！
为了留在NBA，孙悦拿着新手礼包爆出的“巅峰魔术师+巅峰麦迪”体验卡，只身前往克利夫兰试训。
那一天，小皇帝詹姆斯被虐到怀疑人生！
一份底薪，孙悦入驻克利夫兰，从此成了詹姆斯最粗的大腿。
而在球场之外……
斯嘉丽·约翰逊：“孙，你的这双手除了传球，还会按摩吗？”
梅根·福克斯：“比起总冠军戒指，我更想要你……”
从被人嫌弃的饮水机管理员，到令全联盟颤抖的魔术师，更是好莱坞女星们的“东方幻想”！","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/p2o68be32cb4bf8e622834a90900e02bb80~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"斗破星穹","author_id":"","book_id":"7594295297421888537","book_name":"NBA：克利夫兰名宿孙大圣！","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#201818","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"2456人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":746,"name":"游戏体育","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=746&name=游戏体育&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":15,"name":"体育","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=15&name=体育&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":538,"name":"同人","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=538&name=同人&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7594295333673255449","read_count":"2456","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"367971"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"0","serial_count":"173","tags":"游戏体育,体育,系统,同人","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/p2o68be32cb4bf8e622834a90900e02bb80~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779361414&x-signature=xb6fNluGqTPeJ%2FASm0nw246cPjc%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"27905799496203","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"14"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260322190334626C23EC8DF017D85CB0"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"4","score_suffix_text":"阅读不足30分钟后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":4,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":1799,"reply_count":2,"show_pv":238},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"
